title: centaurea saligna
intro: Centaurea saligna, also known as Mountain Everlasting, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are said to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Centaurea saligna is often prepared for herbal use through teas, infusions, and dried flowers, which can be used in a variety of herbal preparations, including capsules and tinctures.
